title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Medlife - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Medlife invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Medlife:
Medlife is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Medlife!
